text:
Sometimes building AI infrastructure is launching cool new things. Mostly, it's plumbing. 

This week we did both. DeepSeek Pro and Grok are stable again after some backend pipe-routing (shoutout to Fireworks and Azure). We also added two new tools to the greenhouse: StoryForge for writing and Frieze for image generation.

Everything is live, open, and free to use. Go build something weird.

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #buildinpublic #deepseek #grok #aiart #webdev
